options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: trap_wave
options.description: The amount of trap items that shorten your current wave cooldown.

options.name: progression_type
options.description: The type of progression you want to play with.

options.name: keeper
options.description: What Keeper do you wish to play with.

options.name: dome
options.description: What Dome do you wish to play with.

options.name: dome_gadget
options.description: What Dome gadget do you wish to play with.

options.name: map_size
options.description: What map size do you wish to play with.

options.name: difficulty
options.description: What difficulty do you wish to play with.

options.name: mining_everything
options.description: You can only claim victory if you mined every single tile of the map

options.name: drill_upgrades
options.description:
The amount of drill upgrades (when playing engineer) in the item pool.
It is not recommended to go lower than 6~7 on large/huge maps.

options.name: kinetic_spheres
options.description:
The amount of kinetic spheres upgrades (when playing assessor) in the item pool.
It is not recommended to go lower than 6~7 on large/huge maps.

options.name: sphere_lifetime
options.description: The amount of sphere lifetime upgrades (when playing assessor) in the item pool.

options.name: droneyard_drones
options.description: The amount of droneyard drone upgrades (when using the droneyard) in the item pool.

options.name: extra_cobalt
options.description: The amount of extra cobalt added in the item pool as filler items.

options.name: extra_water
options.description: The amount of extra water added in the item pool as filler items.

options.name: extra_iron
options.description: The amount of extra iron added in the item pool as filler items.

options.name: challenge_mode
options.description: Progression locations are flagged as progression in challenge mode instead of regular.

options.name: starting_water
options.description: How many iron rewards are replaced with starting water.

options.name: starting_cobalt
options.description: How many iron rewards are replaced with starting cobalt.

options.name: first_assignment
options.description: The first assignment you want to start with.

options.name: assignment_amount
options.description: How many guild assignments you have to clear to clear the world.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
